summary.lv: Senior Software Developer amats Intrum Group IT funkcijā, kurā jāveido un jāuztur backend servisi, API un full-stack risinājumi (Java 17+, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, Kafka, mikroservisi), jāvada tehniskā arhitektūra un jāmentorē komanda.
summary.en: A Senior Software Developer role in Intrum’s Group IT function building and maintaining backend services, APIs and full-stack features (Java 17+, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, Kafka, microservices), leading technical design and mentoring the team.
